title: 闻鸡起舞
meaning: 比喻有志报国的人及时奋起

scenes.title: 听到鸡叫
scenes.prompt: A young man waking up to rooster crowing, cartoon style, dawn scene
scenes.narration: 祖逖听到鸡叫就起床练剑。

scenes.title: 刻苦练剑
scenes.prompt: A young man practicing sword in the early morning, cartoon style, training scene
scenes.narration: 他每天天不亮就起来刻苦练武。

scenes.title: 成为名将
scenes.prompt: A brave general leading army to victory, cartoon style, achievement scene
scenes.narration: 后来他成为了一名英勇的将军，保卫国家。
